text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk down the hallway, I spot Mejiro
McQueen coming my direction, looking unwell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Yes, I'm having no trouble at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a proud member of the esteemed Mejiro
family, I shall endure... a headache as minor as
this one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen is suffering from a headache.
